testcase.name: test_full

failure.message: TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_cte_f29_parse_datos_obj.FunctionsTest testMethod=test_full>
def test_full(self) -> None: datos_obj: Mapping[str, Any] = read_test_file_json_dict( 'test_data/sii-cte/f29/cte--61002000-3--f29-6600000016-datos-obj-fake.json', ) > obj = parse_datos_obj.parse_sii_cte_f29_datos_obj(datos_obj=datos_obj) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
src/tests/test_cte_f29_parse_datos_obj.py:19: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/cl_sii/cte/f29/parse_datos_obj.py:56: in parse_sii_cte_f29_datos_obj obj_params: Mapping[str, Any] = _parse_sii_cte_f29_datos_obj_to_dict( src/cl_sii/cte/f29/parse_datos_obj.py:79: in _parse_sii_cte_f29_datos_obj_to_dict validated_datos_obj = schema_validator(datos_obj) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cl_sii/cte/f29/parse_datos_obj.py:177: in cte_f29_datos_schema_default_validator schema_validator = Validator(CTE_F29_DATOS_OBJ_SCHEMA) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/validator.py:183: in __init__ self.schema = kwargs.get('schema', None) ^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/validator.py:594: in schema self._schema = DefinitionSchema(self, schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:81: in __init__ schema = self.expand(schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:131: in expand schema = cls._rename_deprecated_rulenames(schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
schema = {'additionalProperties': True, 'description': "Schema of (a subset of) the 'datos' JavaScript object embedded in the I...: {'^\\d{3,4}$': {'type': 'string'}}, 'type': 'object'}, ...}, 'required': ['campos', 'extras', 'glosa', 'tipos'], ...}
@staticmethod def _rename_deprecated_rulenames(schema): for field, rules in schema.items(): if isinstance(rules, str): # registry reference continue
for old, new in ( ('keyschema', 'keysrules'), ('validator', 'check_with'), ('valueschema', 'valuesrules'), ): > if old not in rules: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:229: TypeError

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_cte_f29_parse_datos_obj.FunctionsTest testMethod=test_full_2>

schema = {'additionalProperties': True, 'description': "Schema of (a subset of) the 'datos' JavaScript object embedded in the I...: {'^\\d{3,4}$': {'type': 'string'}}, 'type': 'object'}, ...}, 'required': ['campos', 'extras', 'glosa', 'tipos'], ...}
@staticmethod def _rename_deprecated_rulenames(schema): for field, rules in schema.items(): if isinstance(rules, str): # registry reference continue
for old, new in ( ('keyschema', 'keysrules'), ('validator', 'check_with'), ('valueschema', 'valuesrules'), ): > if old not in rules: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable

testcase.name: test_full_3_file_with_missing_value

self = <tests.test_cte_f29_parse_datos_obj.FunctionsTest testMethod=test_full_3_file_with_missing_value>

schema = {'additionalProperties': True, 'description': "Schema of (a subset of) the 'datos' JavaScript object embedded in the I...: {'^\\d{3,4}$': {'type': 'string'}}, 'type': 'object'}, ...}, 'required': ['campos', 'extras', 'glosa', 'tipos'], ...}
@staticmethod def _rename_deprecated_rulenames(schema): for field, rules in schema.items(): if isinstance(rules, str): # registry reference continue
for old, new in ( ('keyschema', 'keysrules'), ('validator', 'check_with'), ('valueschema', 'valuesrules'), ): > if old not in rules: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:229: TypeError
